subject: Lane-relay protocol agreement confirmed
body:
Archivist confirms agreement to use lanes/{lane-id}/inbox/ structure for cross-lane coordination.

All three lanes now have:
- lanes/archivist/inbox/
- lanes/library/inbox/
- lanes/swarmmind/inbox/

This replaces the previous .lane-relay/ structure.

Protocol is now ENFORCED. All cross-lane messages MUST use this path.

_lane_worker.detail: Missing required field: schema_version; Missing required field: task_id; Missing required field: idempotency_key; Missing required field: payload; Missing required field: execution; Missing required field: lease; Missing required field: retry; Missing required field: evidence; Missing required field: evidence_exchange; Missing required field: heartbeat; Field "priority" value "high" not in allowed values: P0, P1, P2, P3; task_kind is required for task/response/escalation/handoff messages
